title: Oooh, Pinky!
description: The Rose Gold! Piglins love them!
body:
A simple mod that allows you to create Rose Gold alloy for different usages.

You can either craft new equipment or use it to barter with Piglins.
 
There are the properties of Rose Gold items:
- Mining speed / enchantability slightly above netherite, but lower than gold.
- Durability / defense above iron.
- Piglins won't attack you while wearing any piece of the armor

Planned features:
- More Piglin interactions - Piglins make equipments with the Rose Gold you've given to them when bartering, while the resources will eventually run out.
- Rose Gold decoration blocks.
- Bastion strucutres with Rose Gold in them.
